channel.title: Geothermal Energy on en.ergie.at
channel.description: Recent content in Geothermal Energy on en.ergie.at

item.title: Template Project
item.description: The project addresses key challenges in the transformation of the energy system in the context of decarbonization, digitalization, and increasing system complexity. The focus is on the development of a standardized PBD approach, which enables the efficient integration of renewable energy sources - particularly geothermal energy - across different system levels.
